description_long: This house features a simple geometric form with a steeply pitched gable roof and a symmetrical facade. The front elevation is divided into several rectangular and triangular panels, separated by dark trim lines, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance. The roof is a solid, dark color, contrasting with the lighter walls below. There are no visible windows or doors, and the facade is defined by its clean, angular lines and geometric segmentation. The structure appears compact and single-storied, with a focus on form rather than ornamentation. The overall design suggests a contemporary architectural style with an emphasis on geometric clarity.
description: A compact, modern house with a steep gable roof and geometric panel divisions on a light facade, accented by dark trim. The design is minimalist, with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_0: The front view shows a symmetrical, triangular gable roof and a facade divided into geometric panels by dark trim lines.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the solid, dark roof and the continuation of the geometric paneling, with no visible openings.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, with the same gable roof and geometric panel divisions, maintaining symmetry.
description_view_3: The opposite side view is identical to the first side, showing the solid roof and geometric wall panels.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway not visibly defined; facade is uninterrupted geometric panels with no apparent door or decorative elements.
